prompt_package.title: dead_friend Character Reference - Bust Portrait

prompt_package.positive_prompt: If this prompt is later used with an image reference, treat image1 as the locked identity reference. inputs.composition_lock: preserve canonical identity and framing rules

continuity_notes: Preserve canonical identity, costume silhouette, and body proportions.
If this prompt is later used with an image reference, treat image1 as the locked identity reference.
Keep the prompt compact enough for ComfyUI text prompt enhancers to expand safely.
Avoid proper nouns in the prompt body unless text is meant to appear on screen.
